title: koeleria macrantha subsp. transsilvanica
intro: Koeleria macrantha subsp. transsilvanica, also known as Transylvanian June grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Koeleria macrantha subsp. transsilvanica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Koeleria macrantha subsp. transsilvanica can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems.
